tweets.text: Bitcoin’s future is shaped by dynamic consensus among nodes, miners, and holders. Influence is weighted by power: nodes by transaction power, miners by computer power, holders by economic power. Protocol changes prevail when validation, security, and capital align. $BTC

thread_tweets.text: Bitcoin’s future is shaped by dynamic consensus among nodes, miners, and holders. Influence is weighted by power: nodes by transaction power, miners by computer power, holders by economic power. Protocol changes prevail when validation, security, and capital align. $BTC
thread_tweets.full_text: Bitcoin’s future is shaped by dynamic consensus among nodes, miners, and holders. Influence is weighted by power: nodes by transaction power, miners by computer power, holders by economic power. Protocol changes prevail when validation, security, and capital align. $BTC

thread_tweets.text: Brand, legal, political, technical, institutional, cultural, and physical power can influence Bitcoin debate, but not settle consensus. They exert second-order influence by persuading, coordinating, constraining, or mobilizing nodes, miners, and holders.
thread_tweets.full_text: Brand, legal, political, technical, institutional, cultural, and physical power can influence Bitcoin debate, but not settle consensus. They exert second-order influence by persuading, coordinating, constraining, or mobilizing nodes, miners, and holders.

Bitcoin’s future is shaped by dynamic consensus among nodes, miners, and holders. Influence is weighted by power: nodes by transaction power, miners by computer power, holders by economic power. Protocol changes prevail when validation, security, and capital align. $BTC

Brand, legal, political, technical, institutional, cultural, and physical power can influence Bitcoin debate, but not settle consensus. They exert second-order influence by persuading, coordinating, constraining, or mobilizing nodes, miners, and holders.

No real blow offs. Not much of an alt szn. 

Generally less euphoria from what I can tell. Top felt more controlled than every cycle I’ve participated in

tweets.text:
this recent curation in punks is the strongest signal yet of this space maturing. we’re finally outgrowing floor speculation and rewarding quality.

this was my thesis when i built my punk collection in 2020. what i didn’t anticipate was how long clean mids would stay overlooked. i think that era is mostly over.
